introSection: Ottovolante (Italian for Roller Coaster) was a steel roller coaster located at Greenland in Italy. It last operated in 2005 or earlier. It was removed in 2021.

sections.title: Images
sections.content: Photos of the roller coaster in 2016.

fullText:
Ottovolante (Italian for Roller Coaster) was a steel roller coaster located at Greenland in Italy. It last operated in 2005 or earlier. It was removed in 2021.

Photos of the roller coaster in 2016.
